g.text: """Run a full campaign against a DataFrame with a health_check callback."""
"""A toy pipeline that's intolerant of nulls and missing columns."""
assert "category" in df.columns, "missing required column: category"
HAVOC-MONKEY CAMPAIGN REPORT seed=42 attacks=3 3/3 FAILED
health_check: FAILED: AssertionError: amount column contains nulls
→ Add null guard or imputation upstream of pipeline entry.
health_check: FAILED: AssertionError: missing required column: category
→ Add explicit column existence check before processing.
→ Add empty-batch guard and volume cap in pipeline input layer.
